---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

This is an [R Markdown](http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code. 

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Ctrl+Shift+Enter*. 

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(GenomicRanges)
library(InteractionSet)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(tibble)
library(S4Vectors)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(EnhancedVolcano)
library(data.table)
library(patchwork)
library(ggplotify)
library(grid)
library(magick)
```

```{r}
setwd("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/4_loop")

loop_counts = read.csv("diffloops_old/1_loop_anno/loop_counts.txt", sep = "\t")
loop_counts$Unchanged = loop_counts$all_loops - loop_counts$DMSO_loops - loop_counts$DP_loops

data_long <- loop_counts %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(DMSO_loops, DP_loops, Unchanged),  # Columns to pivot
    names_to = "Loop Type",    # New column for original column names (P10, P50, P90)
    values_to = "value"       # New column for the values (10, 50, 90, etc.)
  )

p <- ggplot(data_long, aes(x=cellline, y=value, fill=`Loop Type`)) + geom_bar(position="stack", stat="identity", width=0.7) + 
  xlab(NULL) + ylab("Number of Loops") + scale_fill_manual(values = c("#3d85c6","#f44336","#F6caba")) + theme(text = element_text(size = 14), panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), 
        panel.background = element_blank(), axis.line = element_line(colour = "black")) + scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) + scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0))

pdf(paste0("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/figures/loop_anno.pdf"),height=5,width=5)
print(p)
dev.off()

Fig_4A = p

```

```{r}
setwd("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/4_loop")

data = read.table("2_loop_ctcf_deg/ctcf_loop_change_overlap.txt", header=TRUE)
data=data[,c(1,3,5:7)]
colnames(data)=c("cell","CTCF_only","DEG_only","Both","Neither")
data1 = data |> pivot_longer(cols = !cell, names_to = "Loop_type", values_to = "count")
data1$count = as.numeric(data1$count)

#data1$cell <- factor(data1$bound_type, levels=c("Stable Boundary", "DMSO Boundary", "DP Boundary"))
data1$Loop_type <- factor(data1$Loop_type, levels=c("CTCF_only","DEG_only","Both","Neither"))

pdf(paste0("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/figures/ctcf_loop_changes.pdf"),height=5,width=5)
p <- ggplot(data1, aes(x=cell, y=count, fill=Loop_type)) + geom_bar(position="stack", stat="identity", width=0.7) + 
  xlab(NULL) + ylab("Number of Differential Loops") + ylim(0,7000) + 
  theme(text = element_text(size = 14), panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), 
        panel.background = element_blank(), axis.line = element_line(colour = "black")) + 
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) + scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#f44336","#3d85c6","purple","#F6caba")) + 
  labs(fill="Loop Type")
print(p)
dev.off()

Fig_4C = p

```

```{r}
setwd("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/4_loop")

data = read.table("3_loop_tad/bound_loop_change_overlap.txt", header=TRUE)
temp=data.frame(cell = data[,1], DMSO_loops = data[,2]/data[,5], DP_loops = data[,3]/data[,6], All_loops = data[,4]/data[,7])
data=temp
data1 = data |> pivot_longer(cols = !cell, names_to = "Loop_type", values_to = "count")
data1$count = as.numeric(data1$count)
data1$Loop_type <- factor(data1$Loop_type, levels=c("DMSO_loops","DP_loops","All_loops"))

pdf(paste0("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/figures/bound_loop_changes.pdf"),height=5,width=5)
p <- ggplot(data1, aes(x=cell, y=count, fill=Loop_type)) + geom_bar(position="dodge", stat="identity", width=0.7) + 
  xlab(NULL) + ylab("Percentage of Loops Across Differential Boundaries") + ylim(0,7000) + 
  theme(text = element_text(size = 14), panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), 
        panel.background = element_blank(), axis.line = element_line(colour = "black")) + 
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) + scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#3d85c6","#f44336","#F6caba")) + 
  labs(fill="Loop Type")
print(p)
dev.off()

Supp_5C = p

```

```{r}
setwd("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/4_loop")
files = list.files("4_loop_sep_deg/", pattern = "dloops.txt")

loop_dist = data.frame()
for (i in 1:length(files)) {
  temp = read.table(paste0("4_loop_sep_deg/",files[i]), header=TRUE)
  temp1 = temp$distance.bp. %>% as.data.frame()
  colnames(temp1)[1] = "distance"
  #temp1$sample = paste(strsplit(files[i],"_")[[1]][3:4], collapse = "_")
  temp1$cell = strsplit(files[i],"_")[[1]][3]
  temp1$treatment = strsplit(files[i],"_")[[1]][4]
  loop_dist = rbind(loop_dist,temp1)
}

library(gghalves)

stat.test <- loop_dist %>%
  group_by(cell) %>%
  wilcox_test(distance ~ treatment) %>%
  add_significance() %>% add_xy_position()

stat.test$y.position=7.5
stat.test$xmax=c(1.2,2.2,3.2,4.2,5.2)
stat.test$xmin=c(0.8,1.8,2.8,3.8,4.8)

p <- ggplot(loop_dist, aes(x = cell, y = distance, fill = treatment)) +

  geom_half_violin(
    data = subset(loop_dist, treatment == "DMSO"),
    side = "l",
    trim = FALSE,
    scale = "width"
  ) +

  geom_half_violin(
    data = subset(loop_dist, treatment == "DP"),
    side = "r",
    trim = FALSE,
    scale = "width"
  ) +

  theme_classic() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 14)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("DMSO" = "#F8766D", "DP" = "#00BFC4")) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("Distance Between Anchors") +
  labs(fill="Treatment")

p = p +
scale_y_log10() +
stat_pvalue_manual(
  stat.test,
  label = "p.signif",
  tip.length = 0.01
)

pdf(paste0("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/figures/loop_size.pdf"),height=5,width=5)
print(p)
dev.off()

Supp_5D = p

```

```{r}
setwd("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/4_loop")

library(GenomicRanges)
library(ComplexUpset)
library(data.table)
library(igraph)

# -----------------------------
# input files
# -----------------------------
files <- c(
"5_aggregate/B36_DMSOvsDP_B36_DMSO_specific_dloops_nochr.bedpe",
"5_aggregate/B49_DMSOvsDP_B49_DMSO_specific_dloops_nochr.bedpe",
"5_aggregate/B66_DMSOvsDP_B66_DMSO_specific_dloops_nochr.bedpe",
"5_aggregate/NHA_DMSOvsDP_NHA_DMSO_specific_dloops_nochr.bedpe",
"5_aggregate/qNHA_DMSOvsDP_qNHA_DMSO_specific_dloops_nochr.bedpe"
)

names(files) <- c("B36","B49","B66","NHA","qNHA")

buffer <- 10000

allA <- GRanges()
allB <- GRanges()
file_id <- c()

for(i in seq_along(files)){

    x <- fread(files[i])

    grA <- GRanges(
        seqnames=x[[1]],
        ranges=IRanges(
            start=pmax(1,x[[2]]-buffer),
            end=x[[3]]+buffer
        )
    )

    grB <- GRanges(
        seqnames=x[[4]],
        ranges=IRanges(
            start=pmax(1,x[[5]]-buffer),
            end=x[[6]]+buffer
        )
    )

    allA <- c(allA,grA)
    allB <- c(allB,grB)

    file_id <- c(file_id,rep(names(files)[i],nrow(x)))
}

n_loops <- length(allA)

# find anchor overlaps
oa <- findOverlaps(allA,allA)
ob <- findOverlaps(allB,allB)

# create overlap keys
keyA <- paste(queryHits(oa),subjectHits(oa))
keyB <- paste(queryHits(ob),subjectHits(ob))

shared <- intersect(keyA,keyB)

edges <- do.call(rbind,strsplit(shared," "))
edges <- matrix(as.numeric(edges),ncol=2)

# remove self edges
edges <- edges[edges[,1]!=edges[,2],]

# build graph
g <- make_empty_graph(n_loops)

if(nrow(edges)>0){
    g <- add_edges(g,t(edges))
}

clusters <- components(g)$membership

# build upset matrix
cluster_ids <- unique(clusters)

membership <- matrix(FALSE,
                     nrow=length(cluster_ids),
                     ncol=length(files))

colnames(membership) <- names(files)

for(i in seq_along(cluster_ids)){

    members <- which(clusters==cluster_ids[i])
    membership[i,unique(file_id[members])] <- TRUE

}

upset_df <- as.data.frame(membership)


set_cols <- colnames(upset_df)
plot_df <- as.data.frame(upset_df[, set_cols])
plot_df[] <- lapply(plot_df, as.integer)

# -----------------------------
# UpSet plot
# -----------------------------
p = UpSetR::upset(
  plot_df,
  sets = colnames(plot_df),
  nsets = length(colnames(plot_df)),
  nintersects = 20, order.by = "freq", text.scale = 3
)

loop_table <- data.frame(
    chr1 = character(),
    start1 = numeric(),
    end1 = numeric(),
    chr2 = character(),
    start2 = numeric(),
    end2 = numeric(),
    file = character()
)

for(i in seq_along(files)){

    x <- fread(files[i])

    tmp <- data.frame(
        chr1=x[[1]],
        start1=x[[2]],
        end1=x[[3]],
        chr2=x[[4]],
        start2=x[[5]],
        end2=x[[6]],
        file=names(files)[i]
    )

    loop_table <- rbind(loop_table,tmp)
}

loop_table$cluster <- clusters
canonical_loops <- loop_table[!duplicated(clusters),]

target_clusters <- which(
(membership[, "B36"] &
membership[, "B49"] &
membership[, "B66"] &
!membership[, "NHA"] &
!membership[, "qNHA"]) | 
  (membership[, "B36"] &
membership[, "B49"] &
!membership[, "B66"] &
!membership[, "NHA"] &
!membership[, "qNHA"]) | 
  (membership[, "B36"] &
!membership[, "B49"] &
membership[, "B66"] &
!membership[, "NHA"] &
!membership[, "qNHA"]) |
  (!membership[, "B36"] &
membership[, "B49"] &
membership[, "B66"] &
!membership[, "NHA"] &
!membership[, "qNHA"])
)

cluster_members <- which(clusters %in% target_clusters)

loops_of_interest <- loop_table[cluster_members,]
loops_of_interest <- canonical_loops[canonical_loops$cluster %in% target_clusters,]

#write.table(
#loops_of_interest[,1:6],
#"6_shared_diff/GSC_shared_loops_DMSO_specific.bedpe",
#sep="\t",
#quote=FALSE,
#row.names=FALSE,
#col.names=FALSE
#)

tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".png")
png(tmp, width = 18, height = 7, units = "in", res = 300)
print(p)
dev.off()

p_img <- png::readPNG(tmp)

p_gg <- ggplot() +
  annotation_raster(p_img, xmin = 0, xmax = 1, ymin = 0, ymax = 1) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1), clip = "on") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = NULL, expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = NULL, expand = c(0, 0)) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    plot.margin    = margin(0, 0, 0, 0),
    axis.text      = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks     = element_blank(),
    axis.title     = element_blank(),
    panel.border   = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_blank()
  )

Supp_5A = p_gg

```

```{r}
setwd("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/4_loop")

library(GenomicRanges)
library(ComplexUpset)
library(data.table)
library(igraph)

# -----------------------------
# input files
# -----------------------------
files <- c(
"5_aggregate/B36_DMSOvsDP_B36_DP_specific_dloops_nochr.bedpe",
"5_aggregate/B49_DMSOvsDP_B49_DP_specific_dloops_nochr.bedpe",
"5_aggregate/B66_DMSOvsDP_B66_DP_specific_dloops_nochr.bedpe",
"5_aggregate/NHA_DMSOvsDP_NHA_DP_specific_dloops_nochr.bedpe",
"5_aggregate/qNHA_DMSOvsDP_qNHA_DP_specific_dloops_nochr.bedpe"
)

names(files) <- c("B36","B49","B66","NHA","qNHA")

buffer <- 10000

allA <- GRanges()
allB <- GRanges()
file_id <- c()

for(i in seq_along(files)){

    x <- fread(files[i])

    grA <- GRanges(
        seqnames=x[[1]],
        ranges=IRanges(
            start=pmax(1,x[[2]]-buffer),
            end=x[[3]]+buffer
        )
    )

    grB <- GRanges(
        seqnames=x[[4]],
        ranges=IRanges(
            start=pmax(1,x[[5]]-buffer),
            end=x[[6]]+buffer
        )
    )

    allA <- c(allA,grA)
    allB <- c(allB,grB)

    file_id <- c(file_id,rep(names(files)[i],nrow(x)))
}

n_loops <- length(allA)

# find anchor overlaps
oa <- findOverlaps(allA,allA)
ob <- findOverlaps(allB,allB)

# create overlap keys
keyA <- paste(queryHits(oa),subjectHits(oa))
keyB <- paste(queryHits(ob),subjectHits(ob))

shared <- intersect(keyA,keyB)

edges <- do.call(rbind,strsplit(shared," "))
edges <- matrix(as.numeric(edges),ncol=2)

# remove self edges
edges <- edges[edges[,1]!=edges[,2],]

# build graph
g <- make_empty_graph(n_loops)

if(nrow(edges)>0){
    g <- add_edges(g,t(edges))
}

clusters <- components(g)$membership

# build upset matrix
cluster_ids <- unique(clusters)

membership <- matrix(FALSE,
                     nrow=length(cluster_ids),
                     ncol=length(files))

colnames(membership) <- names(files)

for(i in seq_along(cluster_ids)){

    members <- which(clusters==cluster_ids[i])
    membership[i,unique(file_id[members])] <- TRUE

}

upset_df1 <- as.data.frame(membership)


set_cols <- colnames(upset_df1)
plot_df1 <- as.data.frame(upset_df1[, set_cols])
plot_df1[] <- lapply(plot_df1, as.integer)

# -----------------------------
# UpSet plot
# -----------------------------
p = UpSetR::upset(
  plot_df1,
  sets = colnames(plot_df1),
  nsets = length(colnames(plot_df1)),
  nintersects = 20, order.by = "freq", text.scale = 3
)

loop_table <- data.frame(
    chr1 = character(),
    start1 = numeric(),
    end1 = numeric(),
    chr2 = character(),
    start2 = numeric(),
    end2 = numeric(),
    file = character()
)

for(i in seq_along(files)){

    x <- fread(files[i])

    tmp <- data.frame(
        chr1=x[[1]],
        start1=x[[2]],
        end1=x[[3]],
        chr2=x[[4]],
        start2=x[[5]],
        end2=x[[6]],
        file=names(files)[i]
    )

    loop_table <- rbind(loop_table,tmp)
}

loop_table$cluster <- clusters
canonical_loops <- loop_table[!duplicated(clusters),]

target_clusters <- which(
(membership[, "B36"] &
membership[, "B49"] &
membership[, "B66"] &
!membership[, "NHA"] &
!membership[, "qNHA"]) | 
  (membership[, "B36"] &
membership[, "B49"] &
!membership[, "B66"] &
!membership[, "NHA"] &
!membership[, "qNHA"]) | 
  (membership[, "B36"] &
!membership[, "B49"] &
membership[, "B66"] &
!membership[, "NHA"] &
!membership[, "qNHA"]) |
  (!membership[, "B36"] &
membership[, "B49"] &
membership[, "B66"] &
!membership[, "NHA"] &
!membership[, "qNHA"])
)

cluster_members <- which(clusters %in% target_clusters)

loops_of_interest <- loop_table[cluster_members,]
loops_of_interest <- canonical_loops[canonical_loops$cluster %in% target_clusters,]

#write.table(
#loops_of_interest[,1:6],
#"6_shared_diff/GSC_shared_loops_DP_specific.bedpe",
#sep="\t",
#quote=FALSE,
#row.names=FALSE,
#col.names=FALSE
#)

tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".png")
png(tmp, width = 18, height = 7, units = "in", res = 300)
print(p)
dev.off()

p_img <- png::readPNG(tmp)

p_gg <- ggplot() +
  annotation_raster(p_img, xmin = 0, xmax = 1, ymin = 0, ymax = 1) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1), clip = "on") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = NULL, expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = NULL, expand = c(0, 0)) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    plot.margin    = margin(0, 0, 0, 0),
    axis.text      = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks     = element_blank(),
    axis.title     = element_blank(),
    panel.border   = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_blank()
  )

Supp_5B = p_gg


```

```{r}

setwd("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/4_loop")

library(GenomicRanges)
library(ComplexUpset)
library(data.table)
library(igraph)

# -----------------------------
# input files
# -----------------------------
files <- c(
"5_aggregate/B36_DMSOvsDP_B36_DMSO_specific_dloops_nochr.bedpe",
"5_aggregate/B49_DMSOvsDP_B49_DMSO_specific_dloops_nochr.bedpe",
"5_aggregate/B66_DMSOvsDP_B66_DMSO_specific_dloops_nochr.bedpe",
"5_aggregate/NHA_DMSOvsDP_NHA_DMSO_specific_dloops_nochr.bedpe",
"5_aggregate/qNHA_DMSOvsDP_qNHA_DMSO_specific_dloops_nochr.bedpe",
"5_aggregate/B36_DMSOvsDP_B36_DP_specific_dloops_nochr.bedpe",
"5_aggregate/B49_DMSOvsDP_B49_DP_specific_dloops_nochr.bedpe",
"5_aggregate/B66_DMSOvsDP_B66_DP_specific_dloops_nochr.bedpe",
"5_aggregate/NHA_DMSOvsDP_NHA_DP_specific_dloops_nochr.bedpe",
"5_aggregate/qNHA_DMSOvsDP_qNHA_DP_specific_dloops_nochr.bedpe"
)

names(files) <- c("B36_DMSO","B49_DMSO","B66_DMSO","NHA_DMSO","qNHA_DMSO","B36_DP","B49_DP","B66_DP","NHA_DP","qNHA_DP")

buffer <- 10000

allA <- GRanges()
allB <- GRanges()
file_id <- c()

for(i in seq_along(files)){

    x <- fread(files[i])

    grA <- GRanges(
        seqnames=x[[1]],
        ranges=IRanges(
            start=pmax(1,x[[2]]-buffer),
            end=x[[3]]+buffer
        )
    )

    grB <- GRanges(
        seqnames=x[[4]],
        ranges=IRanges(
            start=pmax(1,x[[5]]-buffer),
            end=x[[6]]+buffer
        )
    )

    allA <- c(allA,grA)
    allB <- c(allB,grB)

    file_id <- c(file_id,rep(names(files)[i],nrow(x)))
}

n_loops <- length(allA)

# find anchor overlaps
oa <- findOverlaps(allA,allA)
ob <- findOverlaps(allB,allB)

# create overlap keys
keyA <- paste(queryHits(oa),subjectHits(oa))
keyB <- paste(queryHits(ob),subjectHits(ob))

shared <- intersect(keyA,keyB)

edges <- do.call(rbind,strsplit(shared," "))
edges <- matrix(as.numeric(edges),ncol=2)

# remove self edges
edges <- edges[edges[,1]!=edges[,2],]

# build graph
g <- make_empty_graph(n_loops)

if(nrow(edges)>0){
    g <- add_edges(g,t(edges))
}

clusters <- components(g)$membership

# build upset matrix
cluster_ids <- unique(clusters)

membership <- matrix(FALSE,
                     nrow=length(cluster_ids),
                     ncol=length(files))

colnames(membership) <- names(files)

for(i in seq_along(cluster_ids)){

    members <- which(clusters==cluster_ids[i])
    membership[i,unique(file_id[members])] <- TRUE

}

loop_table <- data.frame(
    chr1 = character(),
    start1 = numeric(),
    end1 = numeric(),
    chr2 = character(),
    start2 = numeric(),
    end2 = numeric(),
    file = character()
)

for(i in seq_along(files)){

    x <- fread(files[i])

    tmp <- data.frame(
        chr1=x[[1]],
        start1=x[[2]],
        end1=x[[3]],
        chr2=x[[4]],
        start2=x[[5]],
        end2=x[[6]],
        file=names(files)[i]
    )

    loop_table <- rbind(loop_table,tmp)
}

loop_table$cluster <- clusters
canonical_loops <- loop_table[!duplicated(clusters),]

#write.table(
#canonical_loops[,1:6],
#"7_merged_loop/GSC_shared_differential_loops.bedpe",
#sep="\t",
#quote=FALSE,
#row.names=FALSE,
#col.names=FALSE
#)

```

```{r}
###DEG/CTCF/Loop overlap
setwd("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/4_loop/7_merged_loop")

############################
# 1) Read loop files
############################
loop_files <- list.files(".", pattern = "quant_loops.bedpe")
loop_df_list <- lapply(loop_files, function(f){
  df <- read.delim(f, header=TRUE)
  out <- df %>%
    dplyr::select(chr1 = 1, start1 = 2, end1 = 3, chr2 = 4, start2 = 5, end2 = 6, loopId = 7, enrichmentScore = 8)
  colname <- gsub("_diffloops_quant_loops.bedpe", "", basename(f))
  colnames(out)[8] <- colname
  return(out)
})
loops_merged <- Reduce(function(x,y) left_join(x,y, by = c("loopId","chr1","start1","end1","chr2","start2","end2")), loop_df_list)
rownames(loops_merged) <- loops_merged$loopId
loops_merged <- loops_merged %>% dplyr::select(-loopId)

############################
# 2) Peak counts processing
############################
peak_file <- "../../cutrun/1_diffbind/GSC_joint_counts_DEG.bed"
peak_raw <- read.delim(peak_file, header=FALSE)
peak_processed <- data.frame(
  chr = peak_raw[,1],
  start = peak_raw[,2],
  stop = peak_raw[,3],
  B36_DMSO = rowMeans(peak_raw[,c(4,5)]),
  B36_DP   = rowMeans(peak_raw[,c(6,7)]),
  B49_DMSO = rowMeans(peak_raw[,c(8,9)]),
  B49_DP   = rowMeans(peak_raw[,c(10,11)]),
  B66_DMSO = rowMeans(peak_raw[,c(12,13)]),
  B66_DP   = rowMeans(peak_raw[,c(14,15)]),
  log2FoldChange = peak_raw[,17],
  padj = peak_raw[,21]
)
peak_processed <- peak_processed[abs(peak_processed$log2FoldChange) > 0.5 & peak_processed$padj < 0.05,]

############################
# 3) RNA counts matrices
############################
rna_files <- list.files("../../rnaseq/1_DESeq2/", pattern = "normcounts_matrix.tsv", full.names = TRUE)
rna_list <- lapply(rna_files, function(f){
  df <- read.delim(f, header=TRUE, row.names=1)
  avg_df <- data.frame(
    rows = rownames(df),
    col1 = rowMeans(df[,1:2]),
    col2 = rowMeans(df[,3:4])
  )
  colnames(avg_df) <- c("rows",gsub("_BRep1","", colnames(df)[1]), gsub("_BRep1","", colnames(df)[3]))
  return(avg_df)
})
rna_counts_merged <- Reduce(function(x,y){
  merge(x,y, by="rows", all=TRUE)
}, rna_list)
rownames(rna_counts_merged) <- rna_counts_merged$rows
rna_counts_merged <- drop_na(rna_counts_merged)
rna_counts_merged <- rna_counts_merged %>% dplyr::select(-rows)

############################
# 4) RNA DEG files
############################
deg_files <- list.files("../../rnaseq/1_DESeq2/", pattern = "_shrinkage_DEGs.bed", full.names = TRUE)
deg_list <- lapply(deg_files, function(f){
  df <- read.delim(f, header=TRUE)
  sample_name <- gsub("_DPvsDMSO_shrinkage_DEGs.bed", "", basename(f))
  out <- data.frame(
    chr = df[,1],
    start = df[,2],
    stop = df[,3],
    geneID = df[,5],
    DEG = abs(df[,7]) > 1 & df[,10] < 0.05
  )
  colnames(out)[5] <- sample_name
  return(out)
})
deg_merged <- Reduce(function(x,y) full_join(x,y, by=c("chr","start","stop","geneID")), deg_list)
rownames(deg_merged) <- deg_merged$geneID
deg_merged <- drop_na(deg_merged)
deg_merged <- deg_merged[, !(colnames(deg_merged) %in% "geneID")]
deg_merged = deg_merged[rowSums(deg_merged[, 4:6]) >= 1, ]
rna_counts_merged = rna_counts_merged[rownames(rna_counts_merged) %in% rownames(deg_merged),]
# convert rownames to column for merging
rna_tmp <- rna_counts_merged %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("geneID")
deg_tmp <- deg_merged %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("geneID") %>%
  dplyr::select(geneID, chr, start, stop)
# merge coordinates into RNA counts
rna_counts_merged <- left_join(deg_tmp, rna_tmp, by = "geneID")
# restore geneID as rownames
rownames(rna_counts_merged) <- rna_counts_merged$geneID
rna_counts_merged <- rna_counts_merged %>% dplyr::select(-geneID)

############################
# 5) granges
############################
# loops granges
# anchors
anchor1 <- GRanges(
  seqnames = loops_merged$chr1,
  ranges = IRanges(loops_merged$start1, loops_merged$end1)
)
anchor2 <- GRanges(
  seqnames = loops_merged$chr2,
  ranges = IRanges(loops_merged$start2, loops_merged$end2)
)
# interaction object
loops_gr <- GInteractions(anchor1, anchor2)
# add enrichment scores as metadata
mcols(loops_gr) <- loops_merged[, -(1:6)]
names(loops_gr) <- rownames(loops_merged)

# peaks granges
peaks_gr <- GRanges(
  seqnames = peak_processed$chr,
  ranges = IRanges(peak_processed$start, peak_processed$stop)
)
mcols(peaks_gr) <- peak_processed[, -(1:3)]

# rna granges
rna_gr <- GRanges(
  seqnames = rna_counts_merged$chr,
  ranges = IRanges(rna_counts_merged$start, rna_counts_merged$stop)
)
mcols(rna_gr) <- rna_counts_merged[, -(1:3)]
names(rna_gr) <- rownames(rna_counts_merged)

############################
# 6) overlap table
############################
anchors_list <- anchors(loops_gr)
anchor1 <- anchors_list[[1]]
anchor2 <- anchors_list[[2]]
# overlap with peaks
ov_peaks_a1 <- findOverlaps(anchor1, peaks_gr)
ov_peaks_a2 <- findOverlaps(anchor2, peaks_gr)
loop_peak_hits <- rbind(
  DataFrame(loop=queryHits(ov_peaks_a1), peak=subjectHits(ov_peaks_a1)),
  DataFrame(loop=queryHits(ov_peaks_a2), peak=subjectHits(ov_peaks_a2))
)
peak_mat <- as.data.frame(mcols(peaks_gr))
peak_sum <- lapply(split(loop_peak_hits$peak, loop_peak_hits$loop), function(idx){
  colSums(peak_mat[idx, , drop=FALSE], na.rm=TRUE)
})
peak_sum <- do.call(rbind, peak_sum)
peak_sum <- as.data.frame(peak_sum)
peak_sum$loop_index <- as.integer(rownames(peak_sum))
peak_idx <- unique(c(
  subjectHits(ov_peaks_a1),
  subjectHits(ov_peaks_a2)
))
peaks_overlap <- peaks_gr[peak_idx]
peaks_bed <- data.frame(
  chr = as.character(seqnames(peaks_overlap)),
  start = start(peaks_overlap),
  end = end(peaks_overlap)
)
write.table(
  peaks_bed,
  "loop_anchor_overlapping_peaks.bed",
  sep="\t",
  quote=FALSE,
  row.names=FALSE,
  col.names=FALSE
)
# overlap with genes
ov_gene_a1 <- findOverlaps(anchor1, rna_gr)
ov_gene_a2 <- findOverlaps(anchor2, rna_gr)
loop_gene_hits <- rbind(
  DataFrame(loop=queryHits(ov_gene_a1), gene=names(rna_gr)[subjectHits(ov_gene_a1)]),
  DataFrame(loop=queryHits(ov_gene_a2), gene=names(rna_gr)[subjectHits(ov_gene_a2)])
)
loop_gene_hits_df <- as.data.frame(loop_gene_hits)
rna_mat <- as.data.frame(mcols(rna_gr))
gene_sum <- lapply(split(loop_gene_hits$gene, loop_gene_hits$loop), function(idx){
  colSums(rna_mat[idx, , drop=FALSE], na.rm=TRUE)
})
gene_sum <- do.call(rbind, gene_sum)
gene_sum <- as.data.frame(gene_sum)
gene_sum$loop_index <- as.integer(rownames(gene_sum))
# final table
loop_coords <- loops_merged[,1:6]
loop_scores <- loops_merged[,7:ncol(loops_merged)]
loop_table <- cbind(
  loop_coords,
  loop_scores
)
loop_table$loop_index <- seq_len(nrow(loop_table))
loop_table <- merge(loop_table, peak_sum, by="loop_index", all.x=TRUE)
loop_table <- merge(loop_table, gene_sum, by="loop_index", all.x=TRUE)
rownames(loop_table) <- loops_merged$loopId
loop_table$loop_index <- NULL
loop_table = drop_na(loop_table)

############################
# 7) heatmap
############################
loop_mat = loop_table[,7:12] %>% as.matrix()
colnames(loop_mat) = c("B36_DMSO","B36_DP","B49_DMSO","B49_DP","B66_DMSO","B66_DP")#,"NHA_DMSO","NHA_DP","qNHA_DMSO","qNHA_DP")

ctcf_mat = loop_table[,17:22] %>% as.matrix()
colnames(ctcf_mat) = c("B36_DMSO","B36_DP","B49_DMSO","B49_DP","B66_DMSO","B66_DP")

rna_mat = loop_table[,25:30] %>% as.matrix()
colnames(rna_mat) = c("B36_DMSO","B36_DP","B49_DMSO","B49_DP","B66_DMSO","B66_DP")#,"NHA_DMSO","NHA_DP","qNHA_DMSO","qNHA_DP")

scaled_loop = t(scale(t(as.matrix(loop_mat))))
colnames(scaled_loop) = c("B36_DMSO","B36_DP","B49_DMSO","B49_DP","B66_DMSO","B66_DP")#,"NHA_DMSO","NHA_DP","qNHA_DMSO","qNHA_DP")
scaled_ctcf = t(scale(t(as.matrix(ctcf_mat))))
colnames(scaled_ctcf) = c("B36_DMSO","B36_DP","B49_DMSO","B49_DP","B66_DMSO","B66_DP")
scaled_rna = t(scale(t(as.matrix(rna_mat))))
colnames(scaled_rna) = c("B36_DMSO","B36_DP","B49_DMSO","B49_DP","B66_DMSO","B66_DP")#,"NHA_DMSO","NHA_DP","qNHA_DMSO","qNHA_DP")

col_fun = circlize::colorRamp2(c(-3, 0, 3), c("lightblue", "white", "red"))
heatmap_loop = ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap(as.matrix(scaled_loop),
                                      col = col_fun,
                                      show_row_names = FALSE, 
                                      show_column_names = TRUE, 
                                      name="Loop ES\nZ-score",
                                      cluster_rows = TRUE,
                                      cluster_columns = FALSE,
                                      row_gap = unit(2, "mm"),
                                      row_title = NULL,
                                      row_split = 2,
                                      use_raster = FALSE,
                                      border = TRUE,
                                      column_names_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 14),
                                      heatmap_legend_param = list(
                                      title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14),
                                      labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14)))
#print(heatmap_TAD)


col_fun = circlize::colorRamp2(c(-3, 0, 3), c("skyblue", "white", "darkorange3"))
heatmap_ctcf = ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap(as.matrix(scaled_ctcf),
                                       col = col_fun,
                                       show_row_names = FALSE, 
                                       show_column_names = TRUE, 
                                       name="CTCF Signal\nZ-score",
                                       cluster_rows = TRUE,
                                       cluster_columns = FALSE,
                                       row_gap = unit(2, "mm"),
                                       row_title = NULL,
                                       use_raster = FALSE,
                                       border = TRUE,
                                       column_names_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 14),
                                       heatmap_legend_param = list(
                                       title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14),
                                       labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14)))

print(heatmap_loop+heatmap_ctcf)
#print(heatmap_ctcf)

pdf("loop_ctcf_rna.ES_ctcf_rna_mega_zscore.pdf",height=5,width=8)
print(heatmap_loop+heatmap_ctcf)
dev.off()


tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".png")
png(tmp, width = 6, height = 8, units = "in", res = 600)
print(heatmap_loop+heatmap_ctcf)
dev.off()

p_img <- png::readPNG(tmp)

p_gg <- ggplot() +
  annotation_raster(p_img, xmin = 0, xmax = 1, ymin = 0, ymax = 1) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1), clip = "on") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = NULL, expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = NULL, expand = c(0, 0)) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    plot.margin    = margin(0, 0, 0, 0),
    axis.text      = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks     = element_blank(),
    axis.title     = element_blank(),
    panel.border   = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_blank()
  )

Fig_4D = p_gg

```
```{r}
###All gene/CTCF/Loop overlap for GSEA
setwd("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/4_loop/7_merged_loop")

############################
# 1) Read loop files
############################
loop_files <- list.files(".", pattern = "quant_loops.bedpe")
loop_df_list <- lapply(loop_files, function(f){
  df <- read.delim(f, header=TRUE)
  out <- df %>%
    dplyr::select(chr1 = 1, start1 = 2, end1 = 3, chr2 = 4, start2 = 5, end2 = 6, loopId = 7, enrichmentScore = 8)
  colname <- gsub("_diffloops_quant_loops.bedpe", "", basename(f))
  colnames(out)[8] <- colname
  return(out)
})
loops_merged <- Reduce(function(x,y) left_join(x,y, by = c("loopId","chr1","start1","end1","chr2","start2","end2")), loop_df_list)
rownames(loops_merged) <- loops_merged$loopId
loops_merged <- loops_merged %>% dplyr::select(-loopId)

############################
# 2) Peak counts processing
############################
peak_file <- "../../cutrun/1_diffbind/GSC_joint_counts_DEG.bed"
peak_raw <- read.delim(peak_file, header=FALSE)
peak_processed <- data.frame(
  chr = peak_raw[,1],
  start = peak_raw[,2],
  stop = peak_raw[,3],
  B36_DMSO = rowMeans(peak_raw[,c(4,5)]),
  B36_DP   = rowMeans(peak_raw[,c(6,7)]),
  B49_DMSO = rowMeans(peak_raw[,c(8,9)]),
  B49_DP   = rowMeans(peak_raw[,c(10,11)]),
  B66_DMSO = rowMeans(peak_raw[,c(12,13)]),
  B66_DP   = rowMeans(peak_raw[,c(14,15)]),
  log2FoldChange = peak_raw[,17],
  padj = peak_raw[,21]
)
peak_processed <- peak_processed[abs(peak_processed$log2FoldChange) > 0.5 & peak_processed$padj < 0.05,]

############################
# 3) RNA counts matrices
############################
rna_files <- list.files("../../rnaseq/1_DESeq2/", pattern = "normcounts_matrix.tsv", full.names = TRUE)
rna_list <- lapply(rna_files, function(f){
  df <- read.delim(f, header=TRUE, row.names=1)
  avg_df <- data.frame(
    rows = rownames(df),
    col1 = rowMeans(df[,1:2]),
    col2 = rowMeans(df[,3:4])
  )
  colnames(avg_df) <- c("rows",gsub("_BRep1","", colnames(df)[1]), gsub("_BRep1","", colnames(df)[3]))
  return(avg_df)
})
rna_counts_merged <- Reduce(function(x,y){
  merge(x,y, by="rows", all=TRUE)
}, rna_list)
rownames(rna_counts_merged) <- rna_counts_merged$rows
#rna_counts_merged <- drop_na(rna_counts_merged) ###leave NAs for cell line specific expressed genes
rna_counts_merged <- rna_counts_merged %>% dplyr::select(-rows)

############################
# 4) RNA DEG files
############################
deg_files <- list.files("../../rnaseq/1_DESeq2/", pattern = "_shrinkage_DEGs.bed", full.names = TRUE)
deg_list <- lapply(deg_files, function(f){
  df <- read.delim(f, header=TRUE)
  sample_name <- gsub("_DPvsDMSO_shrinkage_DEGs.bed", "", basename(f))
  out <- data.frame(
    chr = df[,1],
    start = df[,2],
    stop = df[,3],
    geneID = df[,5],
    DEG = abs(df[,7]) > 1 & df[,10] < 0.05
  )
  colnames(out)[5] <- sample_name
  return(out)
})
deg_merged <- Reduce(function(x,y) full_join(x,y, by=c("chr","start","stop","geneID")), deg_list)
rownames(deg_merged) <- deg_merged$geneID
deg_merged <- drop_na(deg_merged)
deg_merged <- deg_merged[, !(colnames(deg_merged) %in% "geneID")]
#deg_merged = deg_merged[rowSums(deg_merged[, 4:6]) >= 1, ]  ###Just to get coordinate information but don't filter for DEGs
rna_counts_merged = rna_counts_merged[rownames(rna_counts_merged) %in% rownames(deg_merged),]
# convert rownames to column for merging
rna_tmp <- rna_counts_merged %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("geneID")
deg_tmp <- deg_merged %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("geneID") %>%
  dplyr::select(geneID, chr, start, stop)
# merge coordinates into RNA counts
rna_counts_merged <- left_join(deg_tmp, rna_tmp, by = "geneID")
# restore geneID as rownames
rownames(rna_counts_merged) <- rna_counts_merged$geneID
rna_counts_merged <- rna_counts_merged %>% dplyr::select(-geneID)

############################
# 5) granges
############################
# loops granges
# anchors
anchor1 <- GRanges(
  seqnames = loops_merged$chr1,
  ranges = IRanges(loops_merged$start1, loops_merged$end1)
)
anchor2 <- GRanges(
  seqnames = loops_merged$chr2,
  ranges = IRanges(loops_merged$start2, loops_merged$end2)
)
# interaction object
loops_gr <- GInteractions(anchor1, anchor2)
# add enrichment scores as metadata
mcols(loops_gr) <- loops_merged[, -(1:6)]
names(loops_gr) <- rownames(loops_merged)

# peaks granges
peaks_gr <- GRanges(
  seqnames = peak_processed$chr,
  ranges = IRanges(peak_processed$start, peak_processed$stop)
)
mcols(peaks_gr) <- peak_processed[, -(1:3)]

# rna granges
rna_gr <- GRanges(
  seqnames = rna_counts_merged$chr,
  ranges = IRanges(rna_counts_merged$start, rna_counts_merged$stop)
)
mcols(rna_gr) <- rna_counts_merged[, -(1:3)]
names(rna_gr) <- rownames(rna_counts_merged)

############################
# 6) overlap table
############################
anchors_list <- anchors(loops_gr)
anchor1 <- anchors_list[[1]]
anchor2 <- anchors_list[[2]]
# overlap with peaks
ov_peaks_a1 <- findOverlaps(anchor1, peaks_gr)
ov_peaks_a2 <- findOverlaps(anchor2, peaks_gr)
loop_peak_hits <- rbind(
  DataFrame(loop=queryHits(ov_peaks_a1), peak=subjectHits(ov_peaks_a1)),
  DataFrame(loop=queryHits(ov_peaks_a2), peak=subjectHits(ov_peaks_a2))
)
peak_mat <- as.data.frame(mcols(peaks_gr))
peak_sum <- lapply(split(loop_peak_hits$peak, loop_peak_hits$loop), function(idx){
  colSums(peak_mat[idx, , drop=FALSE], na.rm=TRUE)
})
peak_sum <- do.call(rbind, peak_sum)
peak_sum <- as.data.frame(peak_sum)
peak_sum$loop_index <- as.integer(rownames(peak_sum))
peak_idx <- unique(c(
  subjectHits(ov_peaks_a1),
  subjectHits(ov_peaks_a2)
))
peaks_overlap <- peaks_gr[peak_idx]
peaks_bed <- data.frame(
  chr = as.character(seqnames(peaks_overlap)),
  start = start(peaks_overlap),
  end = end(peaks_overlap)
)

# overlap with genes
ov_gene_a1 <- findOverlaps(anchor1, rna_gr)
ov_gene_a2 <- findOverlaps(anchor2, rna_gr)
loop_gene_hits <- rbind(
  DataFrame(loop=queryHits(ov_gene_a1), gene=names(rna_gr)[subjectHits(ov_gene_a1)]),
  DataFrame(loop=queryHits(ov_gene_a2), gene=names(rna_gr)[subjectHits(ov_gene_a2)])
)
loop_gene_hits_df <- as.data.frame(loop_gene_hits)


```

```{r}
setwd("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/4_loop/7_merged_loop")

B36_genes = read.delim("../../rnaseq/1_DESeq2//B36_DPvsDMSO_shrinkage_DEGs.bed", header=TRUE)
B49_genes = read.delim("../../rnaseq/1_DESeq2//B49_DPvsDMSO_shrinkage_DEGs.bed", header=TRUE)
B66_genes = read.delim("../../rnaseq/1_DESeq2//B66_DPvsDMSO_shrinkage_DEGs.bed", header=TRUE)

B36_loop_genes = B36_genes[B36_genes$geneID %in% unique(loop_gene_hits_df[, "gene"]),]
B49_loop_genes = B49_genes[B49_genes$geneID %in% unique(loop_gene_hits_df[, "gene"]),]
B66_loop_genes = B66_genes[B66_genes$geneID %in% unique(loop_gene_hits_df[, "gene"]),]

#B36_loop_DEG = B36_loop_genes[abs(B36_loop_genes$log2FoldChange) >=1 & B36_loop_genes$padj < 0.05,]
#B49_loop_DEG = B49_loop_genes[abs(B49_loop_genes$log2FoldChange) >=1 & B49_loop_genes$padj < 0.05,]
#B66_loop_DEG = B66_loop_genes[abs(B66_loop_genes$log2FoldChange) >=1 & B66_loop_genes$padj < 0.05,]
#
#for (i in c(B36_loop_DEG,B49_loop_DEG,B66_loop_DEG)) {
#  yy <- enrichGO(i$geneID, 'org.Hs.eg.db', keyType = "SYMBOL", ont="ALL", pvalueCutoff=0.05, pAdjustMethod = "BH")
#  p = dotplot(yy, showCategory=15, font.size = 6)
#  
#  pdf(paste0("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/figures/",deparse(substitute(i)),"loop_switch_go.pdf"))
#  print(p)
#  dev.off()
#}

# we want the log2 fold change 
B36_orig_gene_list <- B36_loop_genes$log2FoldChange
B49_orig_gene_list <- B49_loop_genes$log2FoldChange
B66_orig_gene_list <- B66_loop_genes$log2FoldChange
# name the vector
names(B36_orig_gene_list) <- B36_loop_genes$geneID
names(B49_orig_gene_list) <- B49_loop_genes$geneID
names(B66_orig_gene_list) <- B66_loop_genes$geneID
# omit any NA values 
B36_gene_list<-na.omit(B36_orig_gene_list)
B49_gene_list<-na.omit(B49_orig_gene_list)
B66_gene_list<-na.omit(B66_orig_gene_list)
# sort the list in decreasing order (required for clusterProfiler)
B36_gene_list = sort(B36_gene_list, decreasing = TRUE)
B49_gene_list = sort(B49_gene_list, decreasing = TRUE)
B66_gene_list = sort(B66_gene_list, decreasing = TRUE)

h_df <- msigdbr(species = "Homo sapiens", category = "H") %>% dplyr::select(gs_name, gene_symbol)
gsea_B36 <- GSEA(geneList = B36_gene_list, TERM2GENE = h_df)
gsea_B49 <- GSEA(geneList = B49_gene_list, TERM2GENE = h_df)
gsea_B66 <- GSEA(geneList = B66_gene_list, TERM2GENE = h_df)

merged_gsea = merge_result(list(B36=gsea_B36,B49=gsea_B49,B66=gsea_B66))
p = dotplot(merged_gsea, showCategory=15, split=".sign", font.size = 8) + theme(legend.text=element_text(size=5)) + facet_grid(.~.sign)

pdf(paste0("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/figures/loop_merged_gsea_rna.pdf"))
print(p)
dev.off()

Fig_4E = p

```

```{r}
setwd("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/4_loop")
options(scipen = 999)

###Stronger loop examples
chr = "7"
start = 25500000
end = 27500000
cut_val = 0.85
cut_val1 = 0.8

tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".png")
png(tmp, width = 7, height = 6, units = "in", res = 600)
pageCreate(width = 7, height = 6, default.units = "inches")
## Add heatmap annotation
plotText(label = "DP", fontsize = 10, x = 0.5, y = 1.25, just = c("left", "top"), default.units = "inches")
plotText(label = "DMSO", fontsize = 10, x = 0.5, y = 2.25, just = c("left", "bottom"), default.units = "inches")
## Text section label
plotText(label = "B36", fontsize = 10, x = 1.5, y = 0.90, just = c("center", "center"), default.units = "inches")
## Set genomic and dimension parameters in a `params` object
params_c <- pgParams(chrom = chr, chromstart = start, chromend = end, 
                     assembly = "hg38", norm = "VC_SQRT",
                     x = 0.75, width = 1.5, default.units = "inches")
## Get matrix
dmso_mat = readHic("./matrix_for_plot/B36_DMSO.hic", chrom = chr, chromstart = start, chromend = end, assembly = "hg38",
                   resolution = 10000,res_scale = "BP",norm = "VC_SQRT",matrix = "observed",)
## Plot Hi-C triangle
hic_dmso <- plotHicTriangle(data = "./matrix_for_plot/B36_DMSO.hic", params = params_c,
                            zrange = c(0, quantile(dmso_mat$counts, probs = cut_val)), resolution = 10000, flip = TRUE,
                            y = 2.5, height = 0.75, just = c("left", "bottom"))
annoHeatmapLegend(plot = hic_dmso, x = 2.5, y = 1.25,width = 0.13, height = 1.2,just = c("right", "top"), fontcolor = "black")
## Set genomic and dimension parameters in a `params` object
params_d <- pgParams(chrom = chr, chromstart = start, chromend = end, 
                     assembly = "hg38", norm = "VC_SQRT",
                     x = 2.25, width = 1.5, default.units = "inches")
## Get matrix
dp_mat = readHic("./matrix_for_plot/B36_DP.hic", chrom = chr, chromstart = start, chromend = end, assembly = "hg38",
                 resolution = 10000,res_scale = "BP",norm = "VC_SQRT",matrix = "observed",)
## Plot Hi-C triangle
hic_dp <- plotHicTriangle(data = "./matrix_for_plot/B36_DP.hic", params = params_d,
                          zrange = c(0, quantile(dmso_mat$counts, probs = cut_val)), resolution = 10000,
                          y = 1.75, height = 0.75, just = c("right", "bottom"))
## Add line
#plotSegments(x0 = 1.5, y0 = 1, x1 = 1.5, y1 = 4, default.units = "inches", lty = 2, lwd = 1.5, col = "black")
## Add CTCF bigwig
dmso_ctcf = plotSignal(data = "/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/cutrun/0_norm_bw/B36_DMSO_CTCF.bw",
                       binSize = NA, binCap = TRUE, negData = FALSE, chrom = paste0("chr",chr), chromstart = start, chromend = end, 
                       assembly = "hg38", linecolor = "red", fill = NA, ymax = 1, range = c(0,200), scale = FALSE, label = NULL, bg = NA, baseline = TRUE, 
                       baseline.color = "grey", baseline.lwd = 1, orientation = "h", x = 0.75, y = 2.5, width = 1.5, height = 0.5, 
                       just = c("left", "top"), default.units = "inches", draw = TRUE, fontsize = 6)

dp_ctcf = plotSignal(data = "/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/cutrun/0_norm_bw/B36_DP_CTCF.bw",
                     binSize = NA, binCap = TRUE, negData = FALSE, chrom = paste0("chr",chr), chromstart = start, chromend = end, 
                     assembly = "hg38", linecolor = "#37a7db", fill = NA, ymax = 1, range = c(0,200), scale = FALSE, label = NULL, bg = NA, baseline = TRUE, 
                     baseline.color = "grey", baseline.lwd = 1, orientation = "h", x = 0.75, y = 3, width = 1.5, height = 0.5, 
                     just = c("left", "top"), default.units = "inches", draw = TRUE, fontsize = 6)

annoYaxis(plot = dmso_ctcf, at = c(0, 180), fontsize = 6)
annoYaxis(plot = dp_ctcf, at = c(0, 180), fontsize = 6)
plotText(label = "DMSO\nCTCF", x = 0.5, y = 2.8, fontsize = 10, just = c("center", "center"))
plotText(label = "DP\nCTCF", x = 0.5, y = 3.3, fontsize = 10, just = c("center", "center"))
plotText(label = "Genes", x = 0.5, y = 3.75, fontsize = 10, just = c("center", "center"))


dmso_ctcf = plotSignal(data = "/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/cutrun/0_norm_bw/B36_DMSO_CTCF.bw",
                       binSize = NA, binCap = TRUE, negData = FALSE, chrom = paste0("chr",chr), chromstart = 25832500, chromend = 25946700, 
                       assembly = "hg38", linecolor = "red", fill = "red", ymax = 1, range = c(0,200), scale = FALSE, label = NULL, bg = NA, baseline = TRUE, 
                       baseline.color = "grey", baseline.lwd = 1, orientation = "h", x = 0.75, y = 4.5, width = 0.5, height = 0.5, 
                       just = c("left", "top"), default.units = "inches", draw = TRUE, fontsize = 6)

dp_ctcf = plotSignal(data = "/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/cutrun/0_norm_bw/B36_DP_CTCF.bw",
                     binSize = NA, binCap = TRUE, negData = FALSE, chrom = paste0("chr",chr), chromstart = 25832500, chromend = 25946700, 
                     assembly = "hg38", linecolor = "#37a7db", fill = "#37a7db", ymax = 1, range = c(0,200), scale = FALSE, label = NULL, bg = NA, baseline = TRUE, 
                     baseline.color = "grey", baseline.lwd = 1, orientation = "h", x = 0.75, y = 5, width = 0.5, height = 0.5, 
                     just = c("left", "top"), default.units = "inches", draw = TRUE, fontsize = 6)
annoYaxis(plot = dmso_ctcf, at = c(0, 180), fontsize = 6)
annoYaxis(plot = dp_ctcf, at = c(0, 180), fontsize = 6)

dmso_ctcf = plotSignal(data = "/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/cutrun/0_norm_bw/B36_DMSO_CTCF.bw",
                       binSize = NA, binCap = TRUE, negData = FALSE, chrom = paste0("chr",chr), chromstart = 27076660, chromend = 27200670, 
                       assembly = "hg38", linecolor = "red", fill = "red", ymax = 1, range = c(0,250), scale = FALSE, label = NULL, bg = NA, baseline = TRUE, 
                       baseline.color = "grey", baseline.lwd = 1, orientation = "h", x = 1.75, y = 4.5, width = 0.5, height = 0.5, 
                       just = c("left", "top"), default.units = "inches", draw = TRUE, fontsize = 6)

dp_ctcf = plotSignal(data = "/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/cutrun/0_norm_bw/B36_DP_CTCF.bw",
                     binSize = NA, binCap = TRUE, negData = FALSE, chrom = paste0("chr",chr), chromstart = 27076660, chromend = 27200670, 
                     assembly = "hg38", linecolor = "#37a7db", fill = "#37a7db", ymax = 1, range = c(0,250), scale = FALSE, label = NULL, bg = NA, baseline = TRUE, 
                     baseline.color = "grey", baseline.lwd = 1, orientation = "h", x = 1.75, y = 5, width = 0.5, height = 0.5, 
                     just = c("left", "top"), default.units = "inches", draw = TRUE, fontsize = 6)
annoYaxis(plot = dmso_ctcf, at = c(0, 225), fontsize = 6)
annoYaxis(plot = dp_ctcf, at = c(0, 225), fontsize = 6)

## Add genes
params_e <- pgParams(chrom = paste0("chr",chr), chromstart = start, chromend = end, 
                     assembly = "hg38", norm = "VC_SQRT",
                     x = 0.75, width = 1.5, default.units = "inches")
genes_gm <- plotGenes(params = params_e, stroke = 1, fontsize = 6,
                      strandLabels = FALSE,
                      y = 3.5, height = 0.4)
## Annotate genome label
annoGenomeLabel(plot = genes_gm, params = params_e, 
                scale = "Mb", fontsize = 6,
                y = 4)
params_g <- pgParams(chrom = "7", chromstart = 25832500, chromend = 25946700, 
                     assembly = "hg38", norm = "VC_SQRT",
                     x = 0.75, width = 0.5, default.units = "inches")
plotGenomeLabel(params = params_g, 
                scale = "Mb", fontsize = 3,
                length = 0.5, y = 5.5)
params_g <- pgParams(chrom = "7", chromstart = 27076660, chromend = 27200670, 
                     assembly = "hg38", norm = "VC_SQRT",
                     x = 1.75, width = 0.5, default.units = "inches")
plotGenomeLabel(params = params_g, 
                scale = "Mb", fontsize = 3,
                length = 0.5, y = 5.5)
## Add box around zoom
plotRect(x = 1, y = 5, width = 0.5, height = 1, just = "center", default.units = "inches", linecolor = "black",
         lwd = 1, lty = 1, fill = "pink", alpha = 0.25)
plotRect(x = 2, y = 5, width = 0.5, height = 1, just = "center", default.units = "inches", linecolor = "black",
         lwd = 1, lty = 1, fill = "skyblue", alpha = 0.25)
plotSegments(x0 = 0.75, y0 = 5, x1 = 1.25, y1 = 5, default.units = "inches", lty = 1, lwd = 1.5, col = "black")
plotSegments(x0 = 1.75, y0 = 5, x1 = 2.25, y1 = 5, default.units = "inches", lty = 1, lwd = 1.5, col = "black")

plotRect(x = 1.05, y = 3.95, width = 0.1, height = 0.1, just = "center", default.units = "inches", linecolor = "black",
         lwd = 1, lty = 1, fill = "pink", alpha = 0.5)
plotRect(x = 2, y = 3.95, width = 0.1, height = 0.1, just = "center", default.units = "inches", linecolor = "black",
         lwd = 1, lty = 1, fill = "skyblue", alpha = 0.5)
plotSegments(x0 = 1, y0 = 4, x1 = 0.75, y1 = 4.5, default.units = "inches", lty = 1, lwd = 1.5, col = "black")
plotSegments(x0 = 1.1, y0 = 4, x1 = 1.25, y1 = 4.5, default.units = "inches", lty = 1, lwd = 1.5, col = "black")
plotSegments(x0 = 1.95, y0 = 4, x1 = 1.75, y1 = 4.5, default.units = "inches", lty = 1, lwd = 1.5, col = "black")
plotSegments(x0 = 2.05, y0 = 4, x1 = 2.25, y1 = 4.5, default.units = "inches", lty = 1, lwd = 1.5, col = "black")
plotCircle(x=1.51, y=1.28, r=0.05)
plotCircle(x=1.51, y=2.23, r=0.05)

## Text section label
plotText(label = "B49", fontsize = 10, x = 3.5, y = 0.90, just = c("center", "center"), default.units = "inches")
## Set genomic and dimension parameters in a `params` object
params_c <- pgParams(chrom = chr, chromstart = start, chromend = end, 
                     assembly = "hg38", norm = "VC_SQRT",
                     x = 2.75, width = 1.5, default.units = "inches")
## Get matrix
dmso_mat = readHic("./matrix_for_plot/B49_DMSO.hic", chrom = chr, chromstart = start, chromend = end, assembly = "hg38",
                   resolution = 10000,res_scale = "BP",norm = "VC_SQRT",matrix = "observed",)
## Plot Hi-C triangle
hic_dmso <- plotHicTriangle(data = "./matrix_for_plot/B49_DMSO.hic", params = params_c,
                            zrange = c(0, quantile(dmso_mat$counts, probs = cut_val1)), resolution = 10000, flip = TRUE,
                            y = 2.5, height = 0.75, just = c("left", "bottom"))
annoHeatmapLegend(plot = hic_dmso, x = 4.5, y = 1.25,width = 0.13, height = 1.2,just = c("right", "top"), fontcolor = "black")
## Set genomic and dimension parameters in a `params` object
params_d <- pgParams(chrom = chr, chromstart = start, chromend = end, 
                     assembly = "hg38", norm = "VC_SQRT",
                     x = 4.25, width = 1.5, default.units = "inches")
## Get matrix
dp_mat = readHic("./matrix_for_plot/B49_DP.hic", chrom = chr, chromstart = start, chromend = end, assembly = "hg38",
                 resolution = 10000,res_scale = "BP",norm = "VC_SQRT",matrix = "observed",)
## Plot Hi-C triangle
hic_dp <- plotHicTriangle(data = "./matrix_for_plot/B49_DP.hic", params = params_d,
                          zrange = c(0, quantile(dmso_mat$counts, probs = cut_val1)), resolution = 10000,
                          y = 1.75, height = 0.75, just = c("right", "bottom"))
## Add line
#plotSegments(x0 = 3.5, y0 = 1, x1 = 3.5, y1 = 4, default.units = "inches", lty = 2, lwd = 1.5, col = "black")
## Add CTCF bigwig
dmso_ctcf = plotSignal(data = "/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/cutrun/0_norm_bw/B49_DMSO_CTCF.bw",
                       binSize = NA, binCap = TRUE, negData = FALSE, chrom = paste0("chr",chr), chromstart = start, chromend = end, 
                       assembly = "hg38", linecolor = "red", fill = NA, ymax = 1, range = c(0,150), scale = FALSE, label = NULL, bg = NA, baseline = TRUE, 
                       baseline.color = "grey", baseline.lwd = 1, orientation = "h", x = 2.75, y = 2.5, width = 1.5, height = 0.5, 
                       just = c("left", "top"), default.units = "inches", draw = TRUE, fontsize = 6)

dp_ctcf = plotSignal(data = "/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/cutrun/0_norm_bw/B49_DP_CTCF.bw",
                     binSize = NA, binCap = TRUE, negData = FALSE, chrom = paste0("chr",chr), chromstart = start, chromend = end, 
                     assembly = "hg38", linecolor = "#37a7db", fill = NA, ymax = 1, range = c(0,150), scale = FALSE, label = NULL, bg = NA, baseline = TRUE, 
                     baseline.color = "grey", baseline.lwd = 1, orientation = "h", x = 2.75, y = 3, width = 1.5, height = 0.5, 
                     just = c("left", "top"), default.units = "inches", draw = TRUE, fontsize = 6)

annoYaxis(plot = dmso_ctcf, at = c(0, 135), fontsize = 6)
annoYaxis(plot = dp_ctcf, at = c(0, 135), fontsize = 6)
#plotText(label = "DMSO\nCTCF", x = 2.5, y = 2.75, fontsize = 6, just = c("center", "center"))
#plotText(label = "DP\nCTCF", x = 2.5, y = 3.25, fontsize = 6, just = c("center", "center"))

dmso_ctcf = plotSignal(data = "/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/cutrun/0_norm_bw/B49_DMSO_CTCF.bw",
                       binSize = NA, binCap = TRUE, negData = FALSE, chrom = paste0("chr",chr), chromstart = 25832500, chromend = 25946700, 
                       assembly = "hg38", linecolor = "red", fill = "red", ymax = 1, range = c(0,200), scale = FALSE, label = NULL, bg = NA, baseline = TRUE, 
                       baseline.color = "grey", baseline.lwd = 1, orientation = "h", x = 2.75, y = 4.5, width = 0.5, height = 0.5, 
                       just = c("left", "top"), default.units = "inches", draw = TRUE, fontsize = 6)

dp_ctcf = plotSignal(data = "/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/cutrun/0_norm_bw/B49_DP_CTCF.bw",
                     binSize = NA, binCap = TRUE, negData = FALSE, chrom = paste0("chr",chr), chromstart = 25832500, chromend = 25946700, 
                     assembly = "hg38", linecolor = "#37a7db", fill = "#37a7db", ymax = 1, range = c(0,200), scale = FALSE, label = NULL, bg = NA, baseline = TRUE, 
                     baseline.color = "grey", baseline.lwd = 1, orientation = "h", x = 2.75, y = 5, width = 0.5, height = 0.5, 
                     just = c("left", "top"), default.units = "inches", draw = TRUE, fontsize = 6)
annoYaxis(plot = dmso_ctcf, at = c(0, 180), fontsize = 6)
annoYaxis(plot = dp_ctcf, at = c(0, 180), fontsize = 6)

dmso_ctcf = plotSignal(data = "/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/cutrun/0_norm_bw/B49_DMSO_CTCF.bw",
                       binSize = NA, binCap = TRUE, negData = FALSE, chrom = paste0("chr",chr), chromstart = 27076660, chromend = 27200670, 
                       assembly = "hg38", linecolor = "red", fill = "red", ymax = 1, range = c(0,250), scale = FALSE, label = NULL, bg = NA, baseline = TRUE, 
                       baseline.color = "grey", baseline.lwd = 1, orientation = "h", x = 3.75, y = 4.5, width = 0.5, height = 0.5, 
                       just = c("left", "top"), default.units = "inches", draw = TRUE, fontsize = 6)

dp_ctcf = plotSignal(data = "/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/cutrun/0_norm_bw/B49_DP_CTCF.bw",
                     binSize = NA, binCap = TRUE, negData = FALSE, chrom = paste0("chr",chr), chromstart = 27076660, chromend = 27200670, 
                     assembly = "hg38", linecolor = "#37a7db", fill = "#37a7db", ymax = 1, range = c(0,250), scale = FALSE, label = NULL, bg = NA, baseline = TRUE, 
                     baseline.color = "grey", baseline.lwd = 1, orientation = "h", x = 3.75, y = 5, width = 0.5, height = 0.5, 
                     just = c("left", "top"), default.units = "inches", draw = TRUE, fontsize = 6)
annoYaxis(plot = dmso_ctcf, at = c(0, 225), fontsize = 6)
annoYaxis(plot = dp_ctcf, at = c(0, 225), fontsize = 6)

## Add genes
params_e <- pgParams(chrom = paste0("chr",chr), chromstart = start, chromend = end, 
                     assembly = "hg38", norm = "VC_SQRT",
                     x = 2.75, width = 1.5, default.units = "inches")
genes_gm <- plotGenes(params = params_e, stroke = 1, fontsize = 6,
                      strandLabels = FALSE,
                      y = 3.5, height = 0.4)
## Annotate genome label
annoGenomeLabel(plot = genes_gm, params = params_e, 
                scale = "Kb", fontsize = 6,
                y = 4)
params_g <- pgParams(chrom = "7", chromstart = 25832500, chromend = 25946700, 
                     assembly = "hg38", norm = "VC_SQRT",
                     x = 2.75, width = 0.5, default.units = "inches")
plotGenomeLabel(params = params_g, 
                scale = "Mb", fontsize = 3,
                length = 0.5, y = 5.5)
params_g <- pgParams(chrom = "7", chromstart = 27076660, chromend = 27200670, 
                     assembly = "hg38", norm = "VC_SQRT",
                     x = 3.75, width = 0.5, default.units = "inches")
plotGenomeLabel(params = params_g, 
                scale = "Mb", fontsize = 3,
                length = 0.5, y = 5.5)
## Add box around zoom
plotRect(x = 3, y = 5, width = 0.5, height = 1, just = "center", default.units = "inches", linecolor = "black",
         lwd = 1, lty = 1, fill = "pink", alpha = 0.25)
plotRect(x = 4, y = 5, width = 0.5, height = 1, just = "center", default.units = "inches", linecolor = "black",
         lwd = 1, lty = 1, fill = "skyblue", alpha = 0.25)
plotSegments(x0 = 2.75, y0 = 5, x1 = 3.25, y1 = 5, default.units = "inches", lty = 1, lwd = 1.5, col = "black")
plotSegments(x0 = 3.75, y0 = 5, x1 = 4.25, y1 = 5, default.units = "inches", lty = 1, lwd = 1.5, col = "black")

plotRect(x = 3.05, y = 3.95, width = 0.1, height = 0.1, just = "center", default.units = "inches", linecolor = "black",
         lwd = 1, lty = 1, fill = "pink", alpha = 0.5)
plotRect(x = 4, y = 3.95, width = 0.1, height = 0.1, just = "center", default.units = "inches", linecolor = "black",
         lwd = 1, lty = 1, fill = "skyblue", alpha = 0.5)
plotSegments(x0 = 3, y0 = 4, x1 = 2.75, y1 = 4.5, default.units = "inches", lty = 1, lwd = 1.5, col = "black")
plotSegments(x0 = 3.1, y0 = 4, x1 = 3.25, y1 = 4.5, default.units = "inches", lty = 1, lwd = 1.5, col = "black")
plotSegments(x0 = 3.95, y0 = 4, x1 = 3.75, y1 = 4.5, default.units = "inches", lty = 1, lwd = 1.5, col = "black")
plotSegments(x0 = 4.05, y0 = 4, x1 = 4.25, y1 = 4.5, default.units = "inches", lty = 1, lwd = 1.5, col = "black")
plotCircle(x=3.51, y=1.28, r=0.05)
plotCircle(x=3.51, y=2.23, r=0.05)

## Text section label
plotText(label = "B66", fontsize = 10, x = 5.5, y = 0.90, just = c("center", "center"), default.units = "inches")
## Set genomic and dimension parameters in a `params` object
params_c <- pgParams(chrom = chr, chromstart = start, chromend = end, 
                     assembly = "hg38", norm = "VC_SQRT",
                     x = 4.75, width = 1.5, default.units = "inches")
## Get matrix
dmso_mat = readHic("./matrix_for_plot/B66_DMSO.hic", chrom = chr, chromstart = start, chromend = end, assembly = "hg38",
                   resolution = 10000,res_scale = "BP",norm = "VC_SQRT",matrix = "observed",)
## Plot Hi-C triangle
hic_dmso <- plotHicTriangle(data = "./matrix_for_plot/B66_DMSO.hic", params = params_c,
                            zrange = c(0, quantile(dmso_mat$counts, probs = cut_val)), resolution = 10000, flip = TRUE,
                            y = 2.5, height = 0.75, just = c("left", "bottom"))
annoHeatmapLegend(plot = hic_dmso, x = 6.5, y = 1.25,width = 0.13, height = 1.2,just = c("right", "top"), fontcolor = "black")
## Set genomic and dimension parameters in a `params` object
params_d <- pgParams(chrom = chr, chromstart = start, chromend = end, 
                     assembly = "hg38", norm = "VC_SQRT",
                     x = 6.25, width = 1.5, default.units = "inches")
## Get matrix
dp_mat = readHic("./matrix_for_plot/B66_DP.hic", chrom = chr, chromstart = start, chromend = end, assembly = "hg38",
                 resolution = 10000,res_scale = "BP",norm = "VC_SQRT",matrix = "observed",)
## Plot Hi-C triangle
hic_dp <- plotHicTriangle(data = "./matrix_for_plot/B66_DP.hic", params = params_d,
                          zrange = c(0, quantile(dmso_mat$counts, probs = cut_val)), resolution = 10000,
                          y = 1.75, height = 0.75, just = c("right", "bottom"))

## Add line
#plotSegments(x0 = 5.5, y0 = 1, x1 = 5.5, y1 = 4, default.units = "inches", lty = 2, lwd = 1.5, col = "black")
## Add CTCF bigwig
dmso_ctcf = plotSignal(data = "/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/cutrun/0_norm_bw/B66_DMSO_CTCF.bw",
                       binSize = NA, binCap = TRUE, negData = FALSE, chrom = paste0("chr",chr), chromstart = start, chromend = end, 
                       assembly = "hg38", linecolor = "red", fill = NA, ymax = 1, range = c(0,150), scale = FALSE, label = NULL, bg = NA, baseline = TRUE, 
                       baseline.color = "grey", baseline.lwd = 1, orientation = "h", x = 4.75, y = 2.5, width = 1.5, height = 0.5, 
                       just = c("left", "top"), default.units = "inches", draw = TRUE, fontsize = 6)

dp_ctcf = plotSignal(data = "/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/cutrun/0_norm_bw/B66_DP_CTCF.bw",
                     binSize = NA, binCap = TRUE, negData = FALSE, chrom = paste0("chr",chr), chromstart = start, chromend = end, 
                     assembly = "hg38", linecolor = "#37a7db", fill = NA, ymax = 1, range = c(0,150), scale = FALSE, label = NULL, bg = NA, baseline = TRUE, 
                     baseline.color = "grey", baseline.lwd = 1, orientation = "h", x = 4.75, y = 3, width = 1.5, height = 0.5, 
                     just = c("left", "top"), default.units = "inches", draw = TRUE, fontsize = 6)

annoYaxis(plot = dmso_ctcf, at = c(0, 135), fontsize = 6)
annoYaxis(plot = dp_ctcf, at = c(0, 135), fontsize = 6)
## Add zoom
dmso_ctcf = plotSignal(data = "/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/cutrun/0_norm_bw/B66_DMSO_CTCF.bw",
                       binSize = NA, binCap = TRUE, negData = FALSE, chrom = paste0("chr",chr), chromstart = 25832500, chromend = 25946700, 
                       assembly = "hg38", linecolor = "red", fill = "red", ymax = 1, range = c(0,100), scale = FALSE, label = NULL, bg = NA, baseline = TRUE, 
                       baseline.color = "grey", baseline.lwd = 1, orientation = "h", x = 4.75, y = 4.5, width = 0.5, height = 0.5, 
                       just = c("left", "top"), default.units = "inches", draw = TRUE, fontsize = 6)

dp_ctcf = plotSignal(data = "/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/cutrun/0_norm_bw/B66_DP_CTCF.bw",
                     binSize = NA, binCap = TRUE, negData = FALSE, chrom = paste0("chr",chr), chromstart = 25832500, chromend = 25946700, 
                     assembly = "hg38", linecolor = "#37a7db", fill = "#37a7db", ymax = 1, range = c(0,100), scale = FALSE, label = NULL, bg = NA, baseline = TRUE, 
                     baseline.color = "grey", baseline.lwd = 1, orientation = "h", x = 4.75, y = 5, width = 0.5, height = 0.5, 
                     just = c("left", "top"), default.units = "inches", draw = TRUE, fontsize = 6)
annoYaxis(plot = dmso_ctcf, at = c(0, 90), fontsize = 6)
annoYaxis(plot = dp_ctcf, at = c(0, 90), fontsize = 6)

dmso_ctcf = plotSignal(data = "/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/cutrun/0_norm_bw/B66_DMSO_CTCF.bw",
                       binSize = NA, binCap = TRUE, negData = FALSE, chrom = paste0("chr",chr), chromstart = 27076660, chromend = 27200670, 
                       assembly = "hg38", linecolor = "red", fill = "red", ymax = 1, range = c(0,200), scale = FALSE, label = NULL, bg = NA, baseline = TRUE, 
                       baseline.color = "grey", baseline.lwd = 1, orientation = "h", x = 5.75, y = 4.5, width = 0.5, height = 0.5, 
                       just = c("left", "top"), default.units = "inches", draw = TRUE, fontsize = 6)

dp_ctcf = plotSignal(data = "/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/cutrun/0_norm_bw/B66_DP_CTCF.bw",
                     binSize = NA, binCap = TRUE, negData = FALSE, chrom = paste0("chr",chr), chromstart = 27076660, chromend = 27200670, 
                     assembly = "hg38", linecolor = "#37a7db", fill = "#37a7db", ymax = 1, range = c(0,200), scale = FALSE, label = NULL, bg = NA, baseline = TRUE, 
                     baseline.color = "grey", baseline.lwd = 1, orientation = "h", x = 5.75, y = 5, width = 0.5, height = 0.5, 
                     just = c("left", "top"), default.units = "inches", draw = TRUE, fontsize = 6)
annoYaxis(plot = dmso_ctcf, at = c(0, 180), fontsize = 6)
annoYaxis(plot = dp_ctcf, at = c(0, 180), fontsize = 6)
## Add genes
params_e <- pgParams(chrom = paste0("chr",chr), chromstart = start, chromend = end, 
                     assembly = "hg38", norm = "VC_SQRT",
                     x = 4.75, width = 1.5, default.units = "inches")
genes_gm <- plotGenes(params = params_e, stroke = 1, fontsize = 6,
                      strandLabels = FALSE,
                      y = 3.5, height = 0.4)
## Annotate genome label
annoGenomeLabel(plot = genes_gm, params = params_e, 
                scale = "Kb", fontsize = 6,
                y = 4)
params_g <- pgParams(chrom = "7", chromstart = 25832500, chromend = 25946700, 
                     assembly = "hg38", norm = "VC_SQRT",
                     x = 4.75, width = 0.5, default.units = "inches")
plotGenomeLabel(params = params_g, 
                scale = "Mb", fontsize = 3,
                length = 0.5, y = 5.5)
params_g <- pgParams(chrom = "7", chromstart = 27076660, chromend = 27200670, 
                     assembly = "hg38", norm = "VC_SQRT",
                     x = 5.75, width = 0.5, default.units = "inches")
plotGenomeLabel(params = params_g, 
                scale = "Mb", fontsize = 3,
                length = 0.5, y = 5.5)
## Add box around zoom
plotRect(x = 5, y = 5, width = 0.5, height = 1, just = "center", default.units = "inches", linecolor = "black",
         lwd = 1, lty = 1, fill = "pink", alpha = 0.25)
plotRect(x = 6, y = 5, width = 0.5, height = 1, just = "center", default.units = "inches", linecolor = "black",
         lwd = 1, lty = 1, fill = "skyblue", alpha = 0.25)
plotSegments(x0 = 4.75, y0 = 5, x1 = 5.25, y1 = 5, default.units = "inches", lty = 1, lwd = 1.5, col = "black")
plotSegments(x0 = 5.75, y0 = 5, x1 = 6.25, y1 = 5, default.units = "inches", lty = 1, lwd = 1.5, col = "black")

plotRect(x = 5.05, y = 3.95, width = 0.1, height = 0.1, just = "center", default.units = "inches", linecolor = "black",
         lwd = 1, lty = 1, fill = "pink", alpha = 0.5)
plotRect(x = 6, y = 3.95, width = 0.1, height = 0.1, just = "center", default.units = "inches", linecolor = "black",
         lwd = 1, lty = 1, fill = "skyblue", alpha = 0.5)
plotSegments(x0 = 5, y0 = 4, x1 = 4.75, y1 = 4.5, default.units = "inches", lty = 1, lwd = 1.5, col = "black")
plotSegments(x0 = 5.1, y0 = 4, x1 = 5.25, y1 = 4.5, default.units = "inches", lty = 1, lwd = 1.5, col = "black")
plotSegments(x0 = 5.95, y0 = 4, x1 = 5.75, y1 = 4.5, default.units = "inches", lty = 1, lwd = 1.5, col = "black")
plotSegments(x0 = 6.05, y0 = 4, x1 = 6.25, y1 = 4.5, default.units = "inches", lty = 1, lwd = 1.5, col = "black")
plotCircle(x=5.51, y=1.28, r=0.05)
plotCircle(x=5.51, y=2.23, r=0.05)

## Hide page guides
pageGuideHide()
dev.off()

p_img <- image_read(tmp)
p_img_cropped <- image_trim(p_img)
p_gg <- ggplot() +
  annotation_raster(p_img_cropped, xmin = 0, xmax = 1, ymin = 0, ymax = 1) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1), clip = "on") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = NULL, expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = NULL, expand = c(0, 0)) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    plot.margin    = margin(0, 0, 0, 0),
    axis.text      = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks     = element_blank(),
    axis.title     = element_blank(),
    panel.border   = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_blank()
  )

Fig_4F = p_gg

```

```{r}
setwd("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/4_loop/4_loop_sep_deg")

fastq.df <- data.frame(final=c("B36_DMSOvsDP_B36_DMSO_specific_dloops_family_final.txt", 
                    "B36_DMSOvsDP_B36_DP_specific_dloops_family_final.txt",
                    "B49_DMSOvsDP_B49_DMSO_specific_dloops_family_final.txt",
                    "B49_DMSOvsDP_B49_DP_specific_dloops_family_final.txt",
                    "B66_DMSOvsDP_B66_DMSO_specific_dloops_family_final.txt",
                    "B66_DMSOvsDP_B66_DP_specific_dloops_family_final.txt"))
family_list <- as.character(fastq.df$final)
firstTime = TRUE #want to know the first time
for (currentFile in family_list){ #read in files
  print(currentFile)
  teleTable.df <- as.data.frame(read.delim(paste0("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/4_loop/4_loop_sep_deg/",currentFile), header = TRUE))
  #remove rows with less than 30 copies in ref genome
  subset1_teleTable.df<- teleTable.df[teleTable.df$family_genomic_counts >= 30, ]
  #remove rows with less than 10 copies overlapping atac-seq peaks
  subset2_teleTable.df <- subset1_teleTable.df[subset1_teleTable.df$family_CTCF_peaks >= 10, ]
  TE_family_enrichment_1 <- (log2(((subset2_teleTable.df$family_CTCF_peaks/subset2_teleTable.df$family_lengths)/(subset2_teleTable.df$total_CTCF_peaks_in_genome/subset2_teleTable.df$haploid_genome_bp))))
  currentFile1 <- strsplit(currentFile, "/")[[1]]
  currentFile2 <-tail(currentFile1, n=1)
  #currentFileRoot <- gsub("_peaks_family_final.txt", "", currentFile2)
  currentFileRoot = paste(strsplit(currentFile1, "_")[[1]][3],strsplit(currentFile1, "_")[[1]][4], sep="_")
  print(currentFileRoot)
  TE_family_enrichment_1.df <- as.data.frame(subset2_teleTable.df[c(1:2)])
  TE_family_enrichment_1.df$currentFileRoot <- TE_family_enrichment_1
  names(TE_family_enrichment_1.df)[names(TE_family_enrichment_1.df) == 'currentFileRoot'] <- currentFileRoot
  #colnames(TE_enrichment_1.df) <- c("currentFileRoot", currentFileRoot)
  if (firstTime == TRUE){
    final_TE_family_enrichment_1.df <- TE_family_enrichment_1.df
    firstTime = FALSE
  } else {
    final_TE_family_enrichment_1.df <- merge.data.frame(final_TE_family_enrichment_1.df,TE_family_enrichment_1.df, all = TRUE) #
  }
}
final_TE_family_enrichment_1.df[is.na(final_TE_family_enrichment_1.df)] = 0
rownames(final_TE_family_enrichment_1.df) <- final_TE_family_enrichment_1.df$family
final_TE_family_enrichment.m <- as.matrix((final_TE_family_enrichment_1.df[!is.na(final_TE_family_enrichment_1.df$family), ]) %>% dplyr::select(-1,-2))
colnames(final_TE_family_enrichment_1.df)[1] = "Class"
row_ha= rowAnnotation(Class = final_TE_family_enrichment_1.df$Class,
                      col= list(Class = c(
                        "DNA"="#0027C3",
                        "LTR"="#094A00",
                        "LINE"="#DBD800",
                        "SINE"="#C30000")), show_annotation_name=F)
#LTR_ha= rowAnnotation(class = "LTR",
#                      col= list(class = c(
#                        "LTR"="#108500")), show_annotation_name=F)
#tiff("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/cutrun_all/new/2_TE_enrichment/CTCF_TE_class_enrichment_heatmap_v2.tiff", units="in", width=12, height=9, res=300)
col_fun = circlize::colorRamp2(c(0, 1.5, 3), c("blue", "white", "red"))
Supp_5F = Heatmap(
    matrix = final_TE_family_enrichment.m,
    show_row_names = TRUE,
    row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
    column_title = "TE Family Enrichment",
    column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14),
    column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14),
    border = TRUE,
    cluster_columns = FALSE,
    width = unit(10, "cm"),
    height = unit(10, "cm"),
    cluster_rows = FALSE,
    na_col = "grey",
    col = col_fun,
    right_annotation = row_ha,
    heatmap_legend_param = list(
        title = "Enrichment",
        title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14),
        labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14)
    )
)
#dev.off()

family_list <- as.character(fastq.df$final)
family_list <- gsub("family", "subfamily", family_list)
firstTime = TRUE #want to know the first time
for (currentFile in family_list){ #read in files
  print(currentFile)
  teleTable.df <- as.data.frame(read.delim(paste0("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/4_loop/4_loop_sep_deg/",currentFile), header = TRUE))
  #remove rows with less than 30 copies in ref genome
  subset1_teleTable.df<- teleTable.df[teleTable.df$family_genomic_counts >= 30, ]
  #remove rows with less than 10 copies overlapping atac-seq peaks
  subset2_teleTable.df <- subset1_teleTable.df[subset1_teleTable.df$family_CTCF_peaks >= 10, ]
  TE_family_enrichment_1 <- (log2(((subset2_teleTable.df$family_CTCF_peaks/subset2_teleTable.df$family_lengths)/(subset2_teleTable.df$total_CTCF_peaks_in_genome/subset2_teleTable.df$haploid_genome_bp))))
  currentFile1 <- strsplit(currentFile, "/")[[1]]
  currentFile2 <-tail(currentFile1, n=1)
  #currentFileRoot <- gsub("_peaks_subfamily_final.txt", "", currentFile2)
  currentFileRoot = paste(strsplit(currentFile1, "_")[[1]][3],strsplit(currentFile1, "_")[[1]][4], sep="_")
  print(currentFileRoot)
  TE_family_enrichment_1.df <- as.data.frame(subset2_teleTable.df[c(1:3)])
  TE_family_enrichment_1.df$currentFileRoot <- TE_family_enrichment_1
  names(TE_family_enrichment_1.df)[names(TE_family_enrichment_1.df) == 'currentFileRoot'] <- currentFileRoot
  #colnames(TE_enrichment_1.df) <- c("currentFileRoot", currentFileRoot)
  if (firstTime == TRUE){
    final_TE_family_enrichment_1.df <- TE_family_enrichment_1.df
    firstTime = FALSE
  } else {
    final_TE_family_enrichment_1.df <- merge.data.frame(final_TE_family_enrichment_1.df,TE_family_enrichment_1.df, all = TRUE) #
  }
}
final_TE_family_enrichment_1.df[is.na(final_TE_family_enrichment_1.df)] = 0
final_TE_family_enrichment_1.df <- distinct(final_TE_family_enrichment_1.df, subfamily, .keep_all = TRUE)
rownames(final_TE_family_enrichment_1.df) <- final_TE_family_enrichment_1.df$subfamily
final_TE_family_enrichment_2.df <- final_TE_family_enrichment_1.df#[final_TE_family_enrichment_1.df$family=="ERV1",]
final_TE_family_enrichment.m <- as.matrix((final_TE_family_enrichment_2.df[!is.na(final_TE_family_enrichment_2.df$subfamily), ]) %>% dplyr::select(-1,-2,-3))
colnames(final_TE_family_enrichment_1.df)[1] = "Class"
row_ha= rowAnnotation(Class = final_TE_family_enrichment_1.df$Class,
                      col= list(Class = c(
                        "DNA"="#0027C3",
                        "LTR"="#094A00",
                        "LINE"="#DBD800",
                        "SINE"="#C30000")), show_annotation_name=F)

#LTR_ha= rowAnnotation(class = "LTR",
#                      col= list(class = c(
#                        "LTR"="#108500")), show_annotation_name=F)
#
#tiff("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/cutrun_all/new/2_TE_enrichment/CTCF_TE_class_enrichment_heatmap_v2.tiff", units="in", width=12, height=9, res=300)
col_fun = circlize::colorRamp2(c(0, 2, 4), c("blue", "white", "red"))
Supp_5G = Heatmap(
    matrix = final_TE_family_enrichment.m,
    show_row_names = TRUE,
    row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
    column_title = "TE Subfamily Enrichment",
    column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14),
    column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14),
    border = TRUE,
    cluster_columns = FALSE,
    width = unit(10, "cm"),
    height = unit(10, "cm"),
    cluster_rows = FALSE,
    na_col = "grey",
    col = col_fun,
    right_annotation = row_ha,
    heatmap_legend_param = list(
        title = "Enrichment",
        title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14),
        labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14)
    )
)

#dev.off()

```

```{r}
setwd("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/4_loop/8_TET")

TET_filtered = read.table("teprof3_output_quantification.TE.cell_line_GBM.filtered.tsv")
dp_rows <- grepl("DP", TET_filtered$V3)
dmso_ids <- unique(TET_filtered$V1[grepl("DMSO", TET_filtered$V3)])
TET_filtered_DP <- TET_filtered[dp_rows & !(TET_filtered$V1 %in% dmso_ids), ]
TET_meta = read.table("8_1.tumor_specific_transcript_id.TSTET_of_cell_line_GBM.tsv", header=TRUE, sep="\t")
TET_filtered_DP_bed = TET_meta[TET_meta$transcript_id %in% TET_filtered_DP$V1,1:4]
TET_filtered_DP_bed_out = merge(TET_filtered_DP_bed, TET_filtered_DP[,c(1,7)], by.x = "transcript_id", by.y = "V1")
TET_filtered_DP_bed_out = TET_filtered_DP_bed_out[,c(2,3,4,1,5)]
write.table(TET_filtered_DP_bed_out, "teprof3_tumor_specific_DP_specific_TSTET.bed", quote = FALSE, sep = "\t", row.names = FALSE, col.names = FALSE)
###bedtools intersected with differential loops
loop_TET = read.table("diff_loop_indiv_teprof3_tumor_specific_DP_specific_TSTET.txt")
loop_TET$V12 <- sapply(strsplit(loop_TET$V11, "_"), `[`, 1)

upset_df <- loop_TET %>%
  dplyr::select(gene = V10, cell = V12) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  mutate(value = TRUE) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = cell,
    values_from = value,
    values_fill = FALSE
  )

mat <- as.data.frame(upset_df)
rownames(mat) <- mat$gene
mat$gene <- NULL
mat[] <- lapply(mat, as.integer)

p = UpSetR::upset(
  mat,
  sets = colnames(mat),
  nsets = length(colnames(mat)),
  nintersects = 10, order.by = "freq", text.scale = 3
)

#TET_B49_B66 <- TET_meta[TET_meta$transcript_id %in% rownames(mat)[
#  mat$B49 == 0 &
#  mat$B66 == 1 &
#  mat$B36 == 1
#],]

tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".png")
png(tmp, width = 10, height = 6, units = "in", res = 300)
print(p)
dev.off()

p_img <- png::readPNG(tmp)

p_gg <- ggplot() +
  annotation_raster(p_img, xmin = 0, xmax = 1, ymin = 0, ymax = 1) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1), clip = "on") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = NULL, expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = NULL, expand = c(0, 0)) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    plot.margin    = margin(0, 0, 0, 0),
    axis.text      = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks     = element_blank(),
    axis.title     = element_blank(),
    panel.border   = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_blank()
  )

Supp_5H = p_gg



```


```{r}
#Fig4
layout <- "AAA########
           AAA########
           BBB########
           BBBEEEEEEEE
           CCCEEEEEEEE
           CCCEEEEEEEE
           CCCEEEEEEEE
           CCCEEEEEEEE
           DDD########
           DDD########
           DDD########
           "

Fig4 <- wrap_plots(Fig_4A, Fig_4C, Fig_4D, Fig_4E, Fig_4F, design = layout) &
    theme(plot.margin = margin(15, 15, 15, 15))

pdf(paste0("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/figures/Full_Figure4test.pdf"), width = 20, height = 24)
print(Fig4)
dev.off()

#Supp Fig5
layout <- "AAAA#####CCC
           AAAA#####CCC
           BBBB#####DDD
           BBBB#####DDD
           EEEEFFFFGGGG
           EEEEFFFFGGGG
           "

Supp_Fig5 <- wrap_plots(Supp_5A, Supp_5B, Supp_5C, Supp_5D, as.grob(Supp_5F), as.grob(Supp_5G), Supp_5H, design = layout) &
    theme(plot.margin = margin(25, 25, 25, 25)) +
  plot_layout(widths = c(1, 1, 1))

pdf(paste0("/scratch/mmoore/Epitherapy3D/analysis/HiC/paper_final/figures/Full_Supp_Figure5test.pdf"), width = 24, height = 18)
print(Supp_Fig5)
dev.off()

```


Add a new chunk by clicking the *Insert Chunk* button on the toolbar or by pressing *Ctrl+Alt+I*.

When you save the notebook, an HTML file containing the code and output will be saved alongside it (click the *Preview* button or press *Ctrl+Shift+K* to preview the HTML file).

The preview shows you a rendered HTML copy of the contents of the editor. Consequently, unlike *Knit*, *Preview* does not run any R code chunks. Instead, the output of the chunk when it was last run in the editor is displayed.
